query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('analysis', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2013-2018', 'cummins_bin_format_analysis', 'txt', 0, 'Cummins 2013-2018 RAM 6.7L BIN format analysis. 4.01MB flat flash image, PowerPC big-endian. Main code at 0x40000-0x37FA00. Cal ID at 0x6B43C. Part number at 0x3FE0. Segment table at 0x3F0000. Key for EFD→BIN converter.', '{"fileSize":"0x402000","architecture":"PowerPC_BE","codeStart":"0x40000","calIdOffset":"0x6B43C","partNumOffset":"0x3FE0","segmentTable":"0x3F0000","manufacturer":"CMMNS","fuelPumpRef":"FP92901"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2014', 'STOCK_2014D2DJRnoTv10024_32370231SF', 'bin', 4202496, 'Stock 2014 RAM D2 6.7L Cummins BIN (32370231SF). Cal ID: DO90008.15BDC. Reference BIN for EFD→BIN converter development.', '{"partNumber":"32370231SF","calId":"DO90008.15BDC","platform":"D2","transmission":"auto","variant":"DJR_noT"}'),
('training', 'cummins_ram', NULL, NULL, '6.7L_Cummins_HP_Fuel_Pump_ID_Differences', 'pdf', 0, 'Cummins 6.7L high pressure fuel injection pump identification differences. Critical for auto-matching tunes to correct hardware configuration.', '{"topic":"fuel pump identification","engine":"6.7L Cummins","useCase":"auto-tune-distribution"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', NULL, '2025', 'FCACalibrationReportAugust82025', 'pdf', 0, 'FCA/Stellantis Calibration Report August 8, 2025. Latest calibration data for RAM Cummins platforms.', '{"date":"2025-08-08","source":"FCA/Stellantis"}');
